title: Required recess
doc_html:
§17.7. Required recess

            Each public school that includes any of the grades kindergarten through five shall provide at least fifteen minutes of recess, consisting of supervised, unstructured free play, each school day.

            Acts 2023, No. 219, §1.
doc_text:
§17.7.  Required recess
Each public school that includes any of the grades kindergarten through five shall
provide at least fifteen minutes of recess, consisting of supervised, unstructured free play,
each school day.
Acts 2023, No. 219, §1.
